anchors.name: Slogan
anchors.value: Hiện Thực Hoá Ý Chí (VN) / Turn Your Will Into Real (EN)

anchors.name: Typography family policy
anchors.value: system-stack-first; variable axes annotated in tokens

anchors.name: Vietnamese-first commitment
anchors.value: every UI string ships a VN counterpart or an explicit deferral note

rules_extensions: **Never modify the Vietnamese-first commitment.** Every UI string ships a VN counterpart or an explicit deferral note (per part-5 §7).
**Never produce content violating CyberSkill voice principles** (warm · direct · honest · respectful) declared in part-1 §3.
**Anchor immutables for CyberSkill** (slogan, Umber, Ochre, fonts, voice axes) are out-of-scope for any agent fix and require an A2 RFC.
